title: Nightvision+
description: /nv command for servers just like fullbright (With permission support)
body:
![Nightvision+ Poster](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/48029a9732d758004114b43df23f7b8c933ad862_0.webp)


# ✨ Instant Clarity: Simple Night Vision Toggle

Tired of players fumbling in the dark? Give them **instant, perfect night vision** with a single command! This lightweight utility plugin delivers the same full-bright effect as a resource pack, but with the **simplicity and security of a server-side command.** No packs, no client downloads, just pure, dark-defeating clarity.

---

## 💡 Key Features: Seamless Night Vision Control

* **⚡ Instant NV:** Players toggle night vision on and off with one simple command: **/nv**.
* **🚫 No Resource Packs:** Achieves a full-bright effect entirely server-side. Zero client setup required.
* **🗣️ Full MiniMessage Support:** Customize every single message with gorgeous colors and formatting (gradients, and more!).
* **🔎 NV Tracking:** Easily see who's currently using the feature with the **/nv list** command.

---

## 🛠️ Commands & Permissions

| Command | Description | Permission | Default |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **/nv** | Toggles night vision on or off for the sender. | `nv.use` | Operators |
| **/nv list** | Lists all players who currently have night vision enabled. | `nv.list` | Operators |

---

## ⚙️ Configuration (Fully Custom MiniMessage!)

All messages are fully configurable using the powerful **MiniMessage** library, allowing for rich text, colors, and formatting.

```yaml
messages:
  no-permission: "<red>You have no permission to use this command!</red>"
  nvlist-permission: "<red>You have no permission to use /nvlist!</red>"
  nv-enabled: "<gradient:#2ECC71:#3498DB>Night vision enabled!</gradient>"
  nv-disabled: "<red>Night vision disabled.</red>"
```

---

## 💎 Need More Power?
Want advanced features like permission-based command cooldowns and duration limits (e.g., NV for 5 minutes)?
